description: CompositionBlue v-neck t-shirt in 100% cotton, with raglan sleeves, appliqued print on the back near hemline and graphic on the frontFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soaking Remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shade.Warm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryBring out your bright, happy side with this blue tee from disney. The fireworks inspired circular prints on the front along with the logo and a continuation of the graphic in the form of an appliqued circle on the back near the hem, all add to the festive mood of the tee. Team this up with jeans, shorts or a mini denim skirt and converse shoes for a real fire-cracking time with your friends.
